findings.description: Entity type is 'figure' with image_ref but the page image shows a styled text box (highlighted callout), not a photograph or diagram. Content of the caption is accurate. Structural typing is a minor mismatch but does not affect learner-facing accuracy.

reviewer_notes: All nine entities faithfully represent page content. Headings, body paragraphs, and the highlighted purpose box are captured with accurate jp surfaces and semantically correct zh/en translations. The single low-severity finding is a type-classification note on the highlighted callout entity, not a content error.
